content:
MODULE: cosmos.memory.episodic_memory
FILE: cosmos/memory/episodic_memory.py (632 lines)
CATEGORY: memory

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Episodic Memory - Timeline and Session-Based Memory

Q1 2025 Feature: Episodic Memory Timeline
- Visual timeline of all interactions
- "On this day" memory surfacing
- Session replay capability
- Event-based memory organization

CLASSES:
- EventType(Enum): Types of episodic events.
- Episode: A single episodic memory event.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'Episode'
- Session: A session containing multiple episodes.
  Methods: def duration(self) -> Optional[timedelta]
  Methods: def is_active(self) -> bool
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'Session'
- TimelineQuery: Query parameters for timeline search.
- OnThisDayResult: Result from 'on this day' lookup.
- EpisodicMemory: Episodic memory system for timeline-based recall.

Features:
- Session-based org
  Methods: async def initialize(self)
  Methods: async def start_session(self, title: Optional[str]=None, metadata: Optional[dict]=None) -> Session
  Methods: async def end_session(self, summary: Optional[str]=None) -> Optional[Session]
  Methods: async def record_episode(self, event_type: EventType, content: str, importance: float=0.5, emotional
  Methods: async def query_timeline(self, query: TimelineQuery) -> list[Episode]
  Methods: async def get_on_this_day(self, date: Optional[datetime]=None, years_back: int=5) -> list[OnThisDayR
  Methods: async def get_session_replay(self, session_id: str) -> list[Episode]
  Methods: async def get_session_summary(self, session_id: str) -> dict
